title: Personal grooming, health and fitness
description: Deductions for medical assessments, vaccinations, COVID-19 tests, gym fees, cosmetics and personal grooming.
keywords: medical assessments, vaccinations, COVID-19 tests, gym fees, cosmetics, personal grooming

child_links.title: Medical assessments and vaccinations
child_links.description: Deductions you can and can't claim for medical expenses, dental expenses, vaccinations and COVID-19 test expenses.

child_links.title: Personal appearance and grooming
child_links.description: As a rule, you can't claim the costs of personal grooming or cosmetics.

child_links.title: Gym fees and fitness-related expenses
child_links.description: Except in very limited circumstances, you can't claim gym fees or fitness-related expenses.
